<blockquote>[[File:Pillow paw talent.gif|thumb|452x452px|Fluffy~]]Each level allows your Dog to fall '''3 more blocks before taking damage'''.


'''Mastering''' this skill will allow your Dog to '''completely''' '''negate fall damage.'''</blockquote>

== Trivia ==

* You can achieve the same effect with the [[Feathered Mantle]].
* This talent will be disabled when [[Flying Furball]] is active, any points spent will be refunded.
